question_X: Are you bringing any pets into the flat?
answer_Y: I do not own any pets
question_X_cz: Budeš si do bytu brát nějaká zvířata?

question_X: Are you taking any animals?
answer_Y: I'll bring my dog.
question_X_cz: Bereš si s sebou nějaká zvířata?

question_X: Did you consult with your partner/parents?
answer_Y: I haven't spoken to my partner in ages.
question_X_cz: Radila ses s partnerem nebo s rodiči?
answer_Y_cz: S partnerem jsem nemluvila celou věčnost.

question_X: Do you need a lot of space?
answer_Y: I could do with a small studio.

question_X: Have you lived in New York before?
answer_Y: I've only been there for vacation.
question_X_cz: Bydlel jsi už někdy v New Yorku?
answer_Y_cz: Byl jsem tam jen na dovolené.

question_X: Have you researched the areas you are interested in?
answer_Y: I've been looking a lot online.
question_X_cz: Zjišťoval jsi si něco o čtvrtích, které tě zajímají?
answer_Y_cz: Dost jsem toho hledal na internetu.

question_X: Do you have any pets?
answer_Y: I have a cat.

question_X: Does it have to be in the city itself?
answer_Y: It can be on the outskirts
question_X_cz: Musí to být přímo v centru?
answer_Y_cz: Může to být i na okraji.

question_X: Is is close to the Subway station?
answer_Y: It's just down the street.
answer_Y_cz: Je to hned v téhle ulici.

question_X: Will you have to share the flat with anyone?
answer_Y: I'm excited to live on my own.
question_X_cz: Budeš ten byt s někým sdílet?
answer_Y_cz: Těším se, až budu bydlet sám.

question_X: Is it in a safe area?
answer_Y: The neighborhood doesn't see much crime.
answer_Y_cz: V téhle čtvrti k moc zločinům nedochází.

question_X: Want to live in a more affordable area of town?
answer_Y: I would like something a little cheaper.
question_X_cz: Chceš bydlet v nějaké dostupnější části města?

question_X: Do you have a limit of what you want to pay?
answer_Y: Three hundred dollars maximum,
question_X_cz: Máš nějaký strop, kolik chceš platit?

question_X: Would you like a building with a doorman?
answer_Y: That would be nice

question_X: Are you open to having roommates?
answer_Y: I will need the extra cash.

question_X: Are you comfortable with a busy city?
answer_Y: I can handle it.

question_X: Do you like spacious apartments?
answer_Y: I think it's great

question_X: Can you afford the expensive rent?
answer_Y: I have plenty of cash to keep me going for a while.
question_X_cz: Můžeš si dovolit tak vysoký nájem?
answer_Y_cz: Mám dost hotovosti, abych nějakou dobu vydržel.

question_X: Can you show proof of income?
answer_Y: I should be able to

question_X: Have you started looking yet?
answer_Y: I'll look when we arrive.

question_X: Can you show proof of income?
answer_Y: I haven't gotten a job there yet.

question_X: Are you getting a flat in the city?
answer_Y: I can only afford New Jersey.
question_X_cz: Budeš mít byt přímo ve městě?
answer_Y_cz: Můžu si dovolit jen New Jersey.

question_X: Do you have any kids?
answer_Y: With such over-population, I made a conscientious choice to not add to the problem.
answer_Y_cz: Vzhledem k přelidnění jsem se vědomě rozhodla k tomu problému nepřispívat.

question_X: Are you planning on walking to work?
answer_Y: I bought a bike.

question_X: Is New York your only option?
answer_Y: There is also an opening in Boston.
question_X_cz: Je New York tvoje jediná možnost?
answer_Y_cz: Mají volné místo i v Bostonu.

question_X: Did you look at what's out there?
answer_Y: I had a peek
question_X_cz: Díval ses, co se teď nabízí?

question_X: Did you figure out the commute times to work from different boroughs?
answer_Y: I still need to do those calculations.
question_X_cz: Zjišťoval jsi si, jak dlouho ti potrvá cesta do práce z různých čtvrtí?

question_X: Have you lived in New York before?
answer_Y: I've lived in three borroughs.
question_X_cz: Bydlel jsi už někdy v New Yorku?
answer_Y_cz: Bydlel jsem už ve třech různých čtvrtích.

question_X: Do you want to live close to a subway stop?
answer_Y: That's a given.

question_X: Are you thinking about moving to New York permanently ?
answer_Y: I don't want to retire there.
question_X_cz: Uvažuješ o tom, že se do New Yorku přestěhuješ natrvalo?

question_X: Do you mind a long subway ride?
answer_Y: Riding the subway gives me a chance to read more.
answer_Y_cz: V metru mám aspoň čas si víc číst.

question_X: Do you have friends or family in New York?
answer_Y: Most of my friends live there.
question_X_cz: Máš v New Yorku nějaké přátele nebo rodinu?

question_X: Does it have two bedrooms?
answer_Y: It's a studio.

question_X: Is a basement flat okay?
answer_Y: I need to be above ground.

question_X: Are you interested in calling some Realtors?
answer_Y: That'd be helpful.
question_X_cz: Nechceš zkusit obvolat nějaké realitní makléře?

question_X: Do you think you can get a job in New York?
answer_Y: It's a place with a lot of opportunities
question_X_cz: Myslíš, že si v New Yorku najdeš práci?

question_X: Are you wanting to move into the capital?
answer_Y: My first choice is Manhattan.
question_X_cz: Chceš se stěhovat přímo do centra?

question_X: Can you afford to live in New York?
answer_Y: I need a second job.
question_X_cz: Můžeš si dovolit žít v New Yorku?

question_X: Will you be spending Christmas in Calgary?
answer_Y: I'll be Naples.

question_X: Is the neighborhood good?
answer_Y: It's upscale with low crime.
answer_Y_cz: Je to lepší adresa s nízkou kriminalitou.

question_X: Have you decided which one you want?
answer_Y: I found a flat
answer_Y_cz: Jeden byt už jsem si vybral.

question_X: Do you intend to live in the flat ?
answer_Y: The flat is for me and my husband.
question_X_cz: Plánujete v tom bytě sami bydlet?
answer_Y_cz: Ten byt je pro mě a pro manžela.

question_X: Are you offering the asking price?
answer_Y: just a little below it

question_X: Do you have a mortgage right now?
answer_Y: I paid my mortgage off last year.

question_X: Would you like to have a balcony?
answer_Y: that would be ideal

question_X: Are you available to move in April?
answer_Y: I won't be able to move until July.
question_X_cz: Můžeš se stěhovat už v dubnu?
answer_Y_cz: Dřív než v červenci to nepůjde.

question_X: Are you thinking of moving soon?
answer_Y: As soon as possible
question_X_cz: Uvažuješ o stěhování v brzké době?

question_X: Have you decided which neighborhood you want to buy in?
answer_Y: I'm still deciding.
question_X_cz: Už ses rozhodl, v jaké čtvrti chceš kupovat?

question_X: Are you offering the asking price?
answer_Y: I asked for a move-in discount.
answer_Y_cz: Požádal jsem o slevu za nastěhování.

question_X: Isn't it really expensive?
answer_Y: It is more than I thought
answer_Y_cz: Je to víc, než jsem si myslel.

question_X: Are you going to drive your car to work?
answer_Y: That's the plan

question_X: Have you ever been to New York?
answer_Y: This will be my first time.
question_X_cz: Byl jsi někdy v New Yorku?

question_X: Does the neighborhood have a good reputation?
answer_Y: Every website I've looked at has great reviews for the area.
answer_Y_cz: Na všech stránkách, co jsem koukal, měla ta oblast skvělé hodnocení.

question_X: Does it have to be in the city itself?
answer_Y: That's the plan.
question_X_cz: Musí to být přímo ve městě?

question_X: Are you looking at an expensive apartment?
answer_Y: I need something on the cheaper side.
